textByHash.87592c2bacdfcfc0d6542e838db829ca1b9bb794: I'm the head gardener around here. If you're looking for woad leaves, or if you need help with owt, I'm yer man.
textByHash.4bda03fbda2a1160c61f6ccd85ea92b979d3c844: How much are you willing to pay?
textByHash.866b13c7857acdf7b0dee3324f1e9e3e7cfe1daf: No no, that's far too little. Woad leaves are hard to get. I used to have plenty but someone kept stealing them off me.
textByHash.b6e5d0fa037087b0553f91f77d1f458d153dd28c: I'll be around if you have any more gardening needs.
textByHash.902fc70c6752093a126b07ba3cb5e19e06080a6f: Here, have two, you're a generous person.
textByHash.113fd7343c05c06e9d94581a7b9a54f1fdebc4a9: That's a nice thing to say. I do need a hand, now you mention it. You see, there's some stupid mole digging up my lovely garden.
textByHash.b136e953c10fea4cb29682f7a7ead56af2612772: Ah, well this is no ordinary mole! He's a big'un for sure. Ya see... I'm always relied upon to make the most of this 'ere garden - the faster and bigger I can grow plants the better!
textByHash.b14f684f5257475972392bff351970b88b68e52c: In my quest for perfection I looked into 'Malignius-Mortifer's-Super-Ultra-Flora-Growth-Potion'. It worked well on my plants, no doubt about it! But it had the same effect on a nearby mole. Ya can imagine the
textByHash.f7c5882f51a3d6d4267d5260766df885639f515c: havoc he causes to my patches of sunflowers! Why, if any of the other gardeners knew about this mole, I'd be looking for a new job in no time!
textByHash.6ec2482d0c93f6d87c88b1f890eef6578a3ef764: If ya are willing maybe yer wouldn't mind killing it for me? Take a spade and use it to shake up them mole hills. Be careful though, he really is big!
textByHash.890cfc608ef98621038be5d2a4ae8cc39b65e00d: Well, if yer gets any mole skin or mole claws off 'un, I'd trade 'em for bird nests if ye brings 'em here to me.
textByHash.4168e4ff639fbe0db75e5507bbb5a804b2ae5c58: If I'm not mistaken, you've got some body parts from a big mole there! I'll trade it for bird nests if ye likes. Or was ye wantin' some woad leaves instead?
textByHash.7a889e12b9f4eda448fa9df54c3b22d6d3a1fcf7: Those look like my friend Tiffy's armour.
textByHash.c4ed8d713eda0e02ee90d145611e3db2dfffc563: If you had mole slippers, I reckon I could combine 'em.
textByHash.4639138deed48aefc42254446822b3f0c41d1731: Well, those look like very unusual moles indeed. Little 'uns.
textByHash.7bb79945f6361d5a46e02a0ff407d9364e3c86a4: If you had holy sandals, I reckon I could combine 'em.
textByHash.64be2bc56718c0909ab60c56fbee0efe9fca016a: Woops I can't do this right now. Come back in an hour.
